content.en:
"The effect of the ten-dimensional treasure liquid is too good, if there is enough ten-dimensional treasure liquid, it should be able to raise my super-dimensional rule realm to the realm of ten thousand realms in a short period of time!"

Ye Tian muttered.

However, after 10,000 extra-dimensional rule realms, it is a bit difficult to continue to improve the extra-dimensional rules.

And even if it is 10,000 extra-dimensional rule realms, the soul will has reached the ninth dimension, and the chance of impacting the fifth realm is only thirty percent, and once the breakthrough fails, it will be the end of the fall~fall.

Therefore, even if the fourth realm reaches 20,000 or even 30,000 realms of the transcendent rule realm, they do not dare to attack the fifth realm.

This is also why the fifth realm on the side of the 4000 realm is so rare, but the fifth realm is also really extremely powerful, every fifth realm's soul will is the tenth dimensional level, if you master the tenth dimensional will, it is enough to instantly kill any fourth realm, and you can destroy all the creatures of a super dimensional territory in a breath.

......

After leaving the customs, Ye Tian inquired about the situation of the Taiwu Sword Sect and the Chilin Clan.

The Chilin Clan had been wiped out as he had known before, and only a few of them had fled, not knowing where they were hiding, and no one cared.

And the powerhouses of the Taiwu Sword Sect are almost completely wiped out, and now a few extradimensional realms have returned to the Taiwu Sword Sect, and the Taiwu Sword Sect has been sealed, and now there is no news.

As for the ownership of the Ten Dimensional Treasure Tree, a large number of forces, the Fourth Realm were killed, and many strong people were killed, and they were finally controlled by the Snow Mountain Alliance.

The Snow Mountain Alliance has three Fifth Realms, which are relatively powerful overlord-level superdimensional forces, but the one who is really eyeing the Ten Dimensional Treasure Tree is the Snow Mountain Alliance's Fifth Realm powerhouse, the Falling Snow Realm Lord, the personal disciple of the Sand Snow Realm Lord.

The Falling Snow Realm Lord was a cultivator at the peak of the Fourth Realm, but his strength was extremely terrifying, and he had broken through the fifth layer of the Ten Dimensional Heavenly Pass Tower, far surpassing those top Fourth Realms.

"Ten Dimensional Heavenly Gate Tower!"

When Ye Tian inquired about the information, he knew this, and he was suddenly a little curious about the Ten-Dimensional Heavenly Pass Tower, so after some careful inquiry, he knew what the Ten-Dimensional Sky Pass Tower was.

The Ten Dimensional Heavenly Pass Pagoda is an innate multi-dimensional treasure, and it is a top-notch innate multi-dimensional treasure, and it is a treasure left by an invincible powerhouse in the fifth realm.

This treasure was placed in the tenth dimensional void, and the fifth realm left a special means, even the fifth realm could not take it away, otherwise it would be suppressed by the tenth dimensional heavenly gate.

And the ten-dimensional Tianguan Tower also has the existence of a machine spirit, controlling the ten-dimensional Tianguan Tower all the time, and can freely roam the tenth-dimensional void, and it is almost impossible to track down the body of the ten-dimensional Tianguan Tower.

However, the Ten-Dimensional Heavenly Pass Pagoda often releases some Heavenly Pass Orders, and the Fourth Realm can enter the Ten Dimensional Heaven Pass Tower through these Heavenly Pass Orders.

There are a total of ten floors in the Ten-Dimensional Heavenly Pass Tower, and it is rumored that once you break through to the tenth layer, you can obtain the inheritance of the fifth realm, but so far, I don't know how many multi-dimensional tribulations have passed, and there is still no fourth realm that has broken through to the tenth layer.

Now, there is no fourth realm that aspires to break through the tenth layer.

For them, the Ten Dimensional Heavenly Pass Tower is a place where they can test their strength, and it is also a place where they can make a name for themselves.

Because in the Ten Dimensional Heavenly Pass Tower, there is a list, called the Tianguan List, which records the names of tens of thousands of Fourth Realms, once it is on the Tianguan List, you can imagine how great the famous qi is.

Of course, there is definitely no record of the fourth realm that has reached this strength in full, because some of the fourth realms have never broken through the Ten Dimensional Heavenly Pass Tower, and have been hidden by the major forces, which also exists.

"Ten-dimensional Heavenly Gate, interesting!"

Ye Tian is interested in it, and wants to break through, so that he can know what his strength is and what level he is at.

The Heavenly Pass Order was not uncommon, because the machine spirit of the Ten-Dimensional Heavenly Gate Tower often threw a large amount of the Heavenly Pass Order from the Tenth Dimensional Void, so it was not valuable.

Soon.

Ye Tian spent some multi-dimensional treasure coins to buy a Tianguan Order.

Subsequently, he refined this Tianguan Order.

"I am a fourth-realm cultivator, and I can enter the Ten Dimensional Heavenly Pass Tower through the Tianguan Order, so enter and take a look now. "

Ye Tian urged the Tianguan Order, and the Tianguan Order wrapped Ye Tian's body and slowly escaped into the Ten-Dimensional Heavenly Pass Tower.

......

Inside the Ten-Dimensional Heavenly Gate.

Ye Tian appeared in a small space, this was one of the countless small spaces of the Ten-Dimensional Heavenly Gate Tower, he could only stay here for a short time, and every time he entered the Ten Dimensional Heavenly Gate Tower, the interval was one hundred extra-dimensional eras.

And the efficiency of entering the ten-dimensional Tianguan Tower is slow, and the movement is not small.

Therefore, if you want to use the Tianguan Order to dodge the enemy's attack, you can't do it, and you can't escape with it.

"Please fill in the basic information!"

The voice of the instrument spirit of the Ten Dimensional Heavenly Gate Tower came.

Soon, Ye Tian filled in the information, and the information was filled in according to his real name.

"Ye Tian Realm Lord, please fight in the first level!"

Wow!

The passage to the first level emerges.

Ye Tian directly entered this first level and met a gatekeeper of the first level.

This gatekeeper is not a puppet, nor is it a formation condensation, but the real Fourth Realm, the slave of the Fifth Realm at the beginning, who was completely controlled by the Ten Dimensional Heavenly Gate Tower, and has lost himself.

In the Ten Dimensional Heavenly Pass Tower, this slave is an immortal and immortal existence, no matter how he kills it, he can't kill it, but as long as he defeats the other party, he will pass the first level.

And there are many, many such slaves here, all of whom have been accepted by the Fifth Realm over countless years.

"It is worthy of the fifth realm, I have accepted so many slaves over the years, and the strength of many of these slaves is probably above me!"

Ye Tian sighed secretly.

It's a pity that with the fall of the Fifth Realm, these slaves of the Fourth Realm have all been wiped out of themselves by him, and as a gatekeeper, they will test the Fourth Realm one by one.

In fact, these gatekeepers are no longer much different from puppets.

Rumble!!!!!

The strength of the first pass keeper is still very terrifying, the cultivation on his body is the peak of the fourth realm, and the super-dimensional rules have reached the level of a thousand daos, and he has also cultivated an innate multi-dimensional dao body, and has also reached the level of the second level of Dacheng.

It can be said that none of the fourth realms of the Five Thousand Territory have been able to break through this first hurdle when they come here.

"Gravel robbery!"

As soon as Ye Tian made a move, he was a multi-dimensional mastery of the four realms.

Burst!

The grit robbed the light directly through the defender of the first level, shattering its flesh.

But soon, the physical body of the First Keeper was restored.

However, Ye Tian didn't need to fight, and the machine spirit had already announced that he had passed the first level of the mountain.
